sections.paragraph:
(comp. אָוָה No.II).-

(1) subst. lamentation; Pro 23:29, לְמִי אֹוי לְמִי אֲבֹוי “who hath lamentation, who hath misery?” [“want”].

(2) interj.-(a) of lamentation, alas! with a dat. 1Sa 4:8 Isa 3:9 6:5 rarely with an acc. Eze 24:6, Eze 24:9and absol. Num 24:23.-(b) of threatening and imprecating, Num 21:29. Cognate is הֹוי.
